testcase.name: shouldIsolateDataBetweenSchemas

constraint uk_leads_email_user unique (email, user_id) ) 2026-02-25T18:20:47.129-03:00 DEBUG 28304 --- [leadflow-backend] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table logs ( created_at timestamp(6) not
